homepage.description: Leading specialist in sealing applications and their market, Freudenberg Sealing Technologies supplies and develops as a service partner serving customers in a wide variety of industries. Contact us for the right sealing application now.

NOK & Freudenberg Sealing Technologies
Skip to content
Skip to navigation
Skip to search
First-Hand News?
Obtain news and background information about sealing technology, get in touch with innovative products – subscribe to the free e-mail newsletter.
Subscribe now!
Global Leader in Sealing Solutions and Applications
Freudenberg Sealing Technologies is a proven supplier for demanding products and applications, and a development and service partner to customers in the automotive industries and in general industries. We apply 175 years of engineering and materials expertise. Then and now – we are focused on serving our customers’ requirements and needs.
Freudenberg Sealing Technologies Combines Longstanding Engineering and Market Know-How With Unique Material Expertise
Founded on its development of the Simmerring® Radial Shaft Seal in 1929, Freudenberg Sealing Technologies has continuously expanded its industrial seals and component portfolio to include a range of technology solutions that address critical issues like performance, power, friction, emissions and material compatibility. In addition to offering a broad range of high quality, engineered sealing solutions, the company also works collaboratively with customers on the design and validation of custom sealing systems.
Learn more about Freudenberg Sealing Technologies

FACT Surface Technology for the Environment: An Adhesive Bonding Process Without Wet-Chemicals

products.text:
Product Portfolio of Freudenberg Sealing Technologies
Skip to content
Skip to navigation
Skip to search
Talk to Us Directly
Do you have a concern, a question, a problem? Contact us now.
Contact Us!
Our Product Portfolio - Innovative and Tailor-Made Custom Solutions on Demand
Freudenberg Sealing Technologies has been developing innovative brand products at the highest level for decades. With profound materials experience, broad processing expertise, and comprehensive product knowledge, we continuously establish ideal prerequisites for your success.
Contact us
Wide Range of Sealing Types and Materials Fulfilling Industrial Standards
Starting with the Simmerring® seal, developed at Freudenberg in 1929, Freudenberg Sealing Technologies has built up a diverse, continuously customer-oriented product portfolio of sealing technology products – from tailor-made custom solutions all the way up to complete seal packages.
From seals with international industry approvals and products specially developed to meet the standards of Hygienic Design – the range of our products is huge.
Whether your application requires a solution for static, dynamic, or special requirements, we will find the tailor-made solution for you.
Choose a Product Category
Static Seals
Static sealing solutions are used for applications involving no movement between the sealing component and the surface. The best known product in this category is the O-ring.
Dynamic Seals
Dynamic seals are used in applications where there is movement between the component and the seal. Their primary functions are to prevent leakage, reduce friction, and balance forces.
Special Sealing Products
These customized solutions are always individually designed and manufactured, which is why you require the expertise of a sealing solutions specialist with a strong sense of materials, products, and applications.
Accumulators
A hydraulic accumulator is a pressure vessel that performs many tasks in a hydraulic system. We provide you with a complete line, including piston, diaphragm, and bladder accumulators.
Catalyst Coated Membranes for fuel cell and electrolysis
Catalyst-coated membranes (CCMs) for PEM electrolysis and PEM fuel cells. Designed for use in electrochemical systems for hydrogen production and utilization.
Discover our Core Competencies
Materials
Materials are the foundation of our technology. Explore now!
Design & Engineering
Here you will find services that support you in the design, development or layout of components and systems.
Quality
Here we have collected quality-related topics for you – from material certifications to test benches and more.
Customized Sealing Solutions
Freudenberg Xpress® minimizes your downtimes and maximizes your flexibility. Explore now!
